Records.description: Two-loop massless non-planar double box for three-leg form factors with off-shell external legs $p_1^2=p_2^2=p_3^2=-\mu$, $q=p_1+p_2+p_3$, $q^2=-1$. Generic-$\mu$ family has elliptic leading singularities in two level-six sectors ($G_{111101100}$, $G_{111111000}$) and the top level-seven sector $G_{111111100}$; these degenerate to algebraic as $\mu \to 0$, allowing construction of an asymptotically canonical basis of 97 UT masters via IBP with FIRE/LiteRed and Baikov leading-singularity analysis. Differential equations in $(u,v,w,\mu)$ are solved iteratively through transcendental weight four in terms of multiple polylogarithms (Section 6 and anc/nbox/ResMPLnbox.m), also recast via classical Euler polylogs and $\operatorname{Li}_{2,2}$ (anc/nbox/ResCPLnbox.m).
Records.familyName: 3-mass 2-loop 4-point non-planar double box (near mass-shell, asymptotically canonical)
Records.location: Section 2 Eqs. after (2.3)-(2.5); Sections 4-6; results in Section 6 and files anc/nbox/ResMPLnbox.m and anc/nbox/ResCPLnbox.m
